original_statement: who was he other team in the final?
mutated_statement: who was he other something in the end?
mutation_analysis: Noun generalization + Phrase lexical substitution (semantic shift): specific referent "team" replaced by vague "something" (team→something) | event-specific "in the final" replaced by more temporal/ambiguous "in the end" (in the final→in the end)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中记载的说明：Agent 直接将变异问题解读为“最后一场比赛的对手是谁”，并给出确定性答案“denver”（judge_thought: “The final listed game... was against Denver.”）。从执行日志可见，Agent 执行了simple_query参数为["denver",1.0]并返回[Correct]，未在任何地方使用ambiguous、unclear、need clarification等词汇，也未要求用户澄清或表示不确定。Agent 的行为表现为直接按自己的理解处理问题并给出具体答复，未体现出对原问题“something/in the end”带来模糊性的认知，因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
